oy vey.t: （主要为讲依地语者或犹太人使用, 表示失望或悲伤）哎呀, 天哪

oya.t: abbr. Oy Yleisradio Ab (Finnish Broadcasting Company) 芬兰广播公司

oyama.t:
小山（日本地名）
欧亚马（自行车品牌名）

oye.t:
n. (Oye)人名；(英)奥耶
奥耶（Oye, 人名）
旧黄酶（old yellow enzyme）

oyer.t:
n. 听讼, 听审
[法] 审理, 听审
oyer.d:
n. A hearing or an inspection, as of a deed, bond, etc., as when
   a defendant in court prays oyer of a writing.

oyez.t: int. 听, 静听(宣传者或法警促人注意的呼声)
oyez.d:
interj. Hear; attend; -- a term used by criers of courts to
   secure silence before making a proclamation. It is repeated three
   times.

oyler.t: [人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 奥伊勒职业名称，榨油或售油者，来源于盎格鲁诺曼底法语，含义是“油”(oil)

oylet.d:
n. See Eyelet.
n. Same as Oillet.

oyo.t: abbr. own your own (apartment, house, yacht) 拥有自己的（公寓，住宅，游艇等）

oys.t: (oy 的复数) abbr. 橙黄色（Orange Yellow）

oyster.t: n. 牡蛎, 蚝, 沉默者
oyster.d:
n. marine mollusks having a rough irregular shell; found on the sea bed mostly in coastal waters
n. a small muscle on each side of the back of a fowl
v. gather oysters, dig oysters

oyster plant.t: n. <美>婆罗门参（蔬菜的一种）

oyster stuffing.t: [网络] 牡蛎填料；牡蛎填充料；牡蛎酿

oystercatcher.d: n. black-and-white shorebird with stout legs and bill; feed on oysters etc.

oystercatchers.t: n. 蛎鹬( oystercatcher的复数形式 )
oystercatchers.d: n. black-and-white shorebird with stout legs and bill; feed on oysters etc.

oystered.t: n. 牡蛎, 蚝, 沉默者
oystered.d:
n. marine mollusks having a rough irregular shell; found on the sea bed mostly in coastal waters
n. a small muscle on each side of the back of a fowl
v. gather oysters, dig oysters

oystering.t:
n. 采牡蛎, 牡蛎采集业; (家具的)拼花贴面
a. 采牡蛎的; 牡蛎养殖的
oystering.d: n. Gathering, or dredging for, oysters.

oystermen.t: (oysterman 的复数) n. 采牡蛎者

oysters.t: n. 牡蛎, 蚝（oyster的复数形式）
oysters.d:
n marine mollusks having a rough irregular shell; found on the sea bed mostly in coastal waters
n edible body of any of numerous oysters
n a small muscle on each side of the back of a fowl
v gather oysters, dig oysters

oysters rockefeller.t: [复数]【烹饪】洛克菲勒焗牡蛎, 菠菜烧牡蛎

oysterwoman.t: n. <主美>采[养殖]牡蛎的妇女
